heading: Recording, listening to, or observing proceedings of grand or petit juries while deliberating or voting
label: 1508 Recording, listening to, or observing proceedings of grand or petit juries while deliberating or voting
notes: Amendments1996— realigned margins for provisions beginning “shall be fined” and ending “one year, or both.”Pub. L. 104–2941994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $1,000” in par. following par. (b).Pub. L. 103–322
amendments: Amendments1996— realigned margins for provisions beginning “shall be fined” and ending “one year, or both.”Pub. L. 104–2941994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $1,000” in par. following par. (b).Pub. L. 103–322

children.label: a
children.text: records, or attempts to record, the proceedings of any grand or petit jury in any court of the United States while such jury is deliberating or voting; or

children.label: b
children.text: listens to or observes, or attempts to listen to or observe, the proceedings of any grand or petit jury of which he is not a member in any court of the United States while such jury is deliberating or voting—
